description: Implement Virtual Private Database (VPD) / Row-Level Security on the SAAS_CORE.PATIENT_ENCOUNTERS table to enforce multi-tenant isolation. Ensure that database users CLINIC_NORTH_APP and CLINIC_SOUTH_APP can only access records associated with their assigned CLINIC_ID as defined in the CLINIC_USER_MAP table, while the SAAS_ADMIN user retains access to all rows. Verify the solution by confirming that each user sees the appropriate subset of data.
